message:
feat(lzma): Add liblzma C library imports

Like CPython, link against system liblzma via lzma.h:
- Added @cImport for lzma.h (same as CPython's Modules/_lzmamodule.c)

System libraries found:
- liblzma: 5.8.1 (via pkg-config)

TODO: Implement compress/decompress functions using liblzma C API.
TODO: Update build.zig to add -lbz2 and -llzma linker flags.
